title: Uncensored

actors: Eric Portman, Phyllis Calvert, Griffith Jones
plot: During the Nazi occupation of Belgium during World War II, a Belgian resistance group revives the newspaper "La Libre Belgique" to expose and counter Nazi propaganda efforts to deceive the people. They are so effective that the Na...
